pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Bump the base-pom parent version to 1.5.10 to ensure compatibility with newer build standards.
Rename the project artifact, name, description, and URLs from 'association-app' to 'ucronia-app'.
Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.6, which requires Java 17+ and aligns with modern Spring ecosystem.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.2.8 to match the new Spring Boot version.
Upgrade Spring Data BOM to version 2024.1.7 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.4.
Add a custom validation framework dependency.
Add a custom Spring WS starter dependency.
Add a custom Spring WS security starter dependency.
Add a custom architecture testing framework dependency.
Exclude logback-classic from spring-boot-starter-validation to enforce Log4j2 usage.
Exclude log4j-to-slf4j from spring-boot-starter-validation to prevent logging conflicts.
Add Spring Boot Starter Mail dependency for email functionality.
Add Spring Boot Starter Thymeleaf dependency for templating.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Add Caffeine caching library dependency.
Exclude checker-qual from Caffeine to avoid dependency convergence issues.
Add explicit Jakarta Validation API dependency.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry dependency for metrics.
Update SLF4J API version to 2.0.17.
Switch from log4j-slf4j-impl to log4j-slf4j2-impl to support SLF4J 2.x.
Exclude commons-logging from log4j-jcl to enforce SLF4J/Log4j2 logging chain.
Add Apache POI dependency for Excel file handling.
Add Apache POI OOXML dependency for modern Excel format support.
Add Commons Codec dependency for encoding utilities.
Remove JSON Web Token (jjwt) dependencies, likely replaced by Spring Security or custom framework.
Remove Apache Commons Collections dependency.
Remove explicit Byte Buddy dependency, likely managed by Spring Boot now.
Remove explicit Micrometer Commons dependency.
Remove explicit Micrometer Observation dependency.
Remove JUnit Platform Runner dependency, likely no longer needed with JUnit 5.
Explicitly scope Spring Security Test dependency to test.
Add Testcontainers dependency for integration testing.
Add PostgreSQL Testcontainer dependency for database integration tests.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architecture testing.
Add AssertJ dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
Remove build-helper-maven-plugin, likely no longer needed for JPA meta-model generation.
Update Maven site skin version to 2.4.1.

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Replaced a reusable workflow call for JDK 17 with an inline workflow definition to support testing on multiple JDK versions (17 and 20).
.github/workflows/test.yml.human_impl: Replaced `uses: Bernardo-MG/github-workflow-maven` with inline `runs-on`, `strategy.matrix`, and `steps` using `actions/setup-java@v4`.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added .env to .gitignore to prevent committing Docker environment variables.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the build stage base image from Maven with JDK 11 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin JDK 22 to support the target Java version.
Upgrade the deployment stage base image from OpenJDK 14 to Eclipse Temurin JRE 22 to match the target Java version.
Replace the deprecated or less efficient `dependency:resolve` with `dependency:go-offline` for better dependency caching in multi-stage builds.
Refine file copying to separate source code from dependencies to improve Docker layer caching efficiency.
Standardize the working directory path from `/usr/src/app` to `/app` for consistency across stages.
Replace `curl` with `wget` in the health check command, likely because `curl` is not available in the new Alpine-based JRE image.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: CMD wget -T5 -qO- http://localhost:8080/actuator/health | grep UP || exit 1

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Introduce a non-root user (`runner`) for security best practices in the container runtime.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN addgroup -S runners && adduser --disabled-password -S runner -G runners

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a dedicated logs directory and expose it as a volume for persistent logging outside the container.
Change the CMD instruction from shell form to exec form to ensure proper signal handling and process management.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Restrict database and backend ports to localhost for improved security.
Correct the PostgreSQL healthcheck command to use the correct user flag.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed healthcheck test from 'pg_isready -d db_prod' to 'pg_isready -U postgres'.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Mount an SQL script to initialize database schemas on startup.
Move environment configuration to a .env file for better management.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'env_file: - .env' and removed inline sensitive/variable env vars.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the active Spring profile name to match new conventions.
Persist application logs to a Docker volume for external consumption.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'association-logs' volume and mapped it to '/app/logs'.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Promtail to ship logs to Loki.
Add Grafana for visualization of metrics and logs.
Define explicit networks for app, db, and monitoring isolation.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'networks: app, db, monitoring' section and assigned services.

readme.md.general_idea: Updated the project title and description to reflect the new name 'Ucronia App Backend'.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed '# Association App Backend' to '# Ucronia App Backend' and updated the description.

readme.md.general_idea: Removed documentation and Javadoc badges from the README header.
readme.md.human_impl: Deleted lines containing img.shields.io badges for docs and javadocs.

readme.md.general_idea: Simplified the documentation section by removing links to release/develop specific docs and javadocs.
readme.md.human_impl: Removed lists of links to release/develop documentation and javadoc sites.

readme.md.general_idea: Updated the local query URL to remove the '/entity' suffix.
Updated the Docker Compose project name to match the new application name.
Added a section describing included monitoring tools like Grafana.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '#### Monitoring' section with link to Grafana.

readme.md.general_idea: Updated GitHub and SCM links to point to the new repository name.
Removed reference links for documentation sites that are no longer linked in the text.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Reorganized the master changelog to group includes by domain (General, Association, Inventory, Security) and updated file references to match the new modular structure.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Replaced includes for member.yaml, balance.yaml, etc., with configuration.yaml, association.yaml, funds.yaml, people.yaml, inventory.yaml, library.yaml, and auth.yaml.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Moved authentication initialization logic to a classpath resource to decouple it from the file-system relative structure.
Removed inline changeSets that executed SQL files for sequence and auth initialization, likely because this logic was moved into the new included changelog files.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Deleted changeSets 'initial_sequences' and 'auth_initial_data' which referenced data/initialize_association_sequences.sql and data/auth/*.sql.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Updated console appender pattern to include color highlighting and thread information for better readability.
Replaced static File appender with RollingFile appender to support log rotation by size and time.
Configured policies to trigger log file rollover on startup, daily, and when file size exceeds 10 MB.
Added reference to the file appender in the application logger to persist logs to disk.
Removed the unused Properties block defining the filename since the new RollingFile uses hardcoded paths.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL inserts to match the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use different column names.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ... INSERT INTO association.fees ...

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use a schema prefix.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: Replaced INSERT into 'fees' with INSERT into 'association.transactions' and 'association.fees' including new columns like transaction_id.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.general_idea: Update test SQL data to match the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and persons.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees ...
